languages.text: {n}За вашей спиной раздается шум множества шагов. Прошедшие по расчищенному от ловушек пути, позади стоят наскоро перебинтованные техножрецы Декабалуса и сам артизан.{/n} "Благодарно: ваша помощь в разминировании пути была чрезвычайно эффективна. Мы окажем поддержку в бою с врагом {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".

traits.locale_text: {n}За вашей спиной раздается шум множества шагов. Прошедшие по расчищенному от ловушек пути, позади стоят наскоро перебинтованные техножрецы Декабалуса и сам артизан.{/n} "Благодарно: ваша помощь в разминировании пути была чрезвычайно эффективна. Мы окажем поддержку в бою с врагом {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".
traits.speaker: DLC3_OP_Xenarite_TechPriest_Unit

languages.text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
languages.original_text: {n}За вашей спиной раздается шум множества шагов. Мы окажем поддержку в бою с врагом {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".

After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: {n}あなたの背後から、多くの足音が聞こえてくる。今、道がクリアされた後、デカバルスの急いで包帯を巻いたテクプリストたちが、そしてその職人自身も、あなたの背後に立ちます。{/n}「感謝の意：罠の道を開くお手伝いは非常に効果的でした。オムニシアの敵との戦いで、我々は支援を提供いたします」
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの背後から、多くの足音が聞こえてくる。今、道がクリアされた後、デカバルスの急いで包帯を巻いたテクプリストたちが、そしてその職人自身も、あなたの背後に立ちます。{n}「感謝の意：罠の道を開くお手伝いは非常に効果的でした。オムニシアの敵との戦いで、我々は支援を提供いたします。」

languages.text: {n}Escuchas numerosos pasos por encima de tu hombro. Tras atravesar el camino que has despejado, Los sacerdotes vendados de Decabalus se colocan a tu lado, junto al propio artesano.{/n} «Agradecimiento: su ayuda al despejar las trampas del camino ha sido extremadamente eficaz. Ofreceremos nuestro apoyo en la batalla contra los enemigos del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}».
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Escuchas numerosos pasos por encima de tu hombro. Tras atravesar el camino que has despejado, Los sacerdotes vendados de Decabalus se colocan a tu lado, junto al propio artesano.{/n} «Agradecimiento: su ayuda al despejar las trampas del camino ha sido extremadamente eficaz. Ofreceremos nuestro apoyo en la batalla contra los enemigos del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}».

languages.text: {n}你听到身后传来纷乱的脚步声。匠人德卡巴洛斯带着那些匆忙包扎过的技术神甫，穿过刚被清空的道路，站在了你身后。{/n}“感激：阁下清除路径陷阱的协助极为高效。我们将在对抗{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}之敌的战斗中提供支援。”
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到身后传来纷乱的脚步声。匠人德卡巴洛斯带着那些匆忙包扎过的技术神甫，穿过刚被清空的道路，站在了你身后。{/n}“感激：阁下清除路径陷阱的协助极为高效。我们将在对抗{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}之敌的战斗中提供支援。”

languages.text: {n}Du hörst hinter die das Geräusch vieler Schritte. Nachdem sie den jetzt freien Weg passiert haben, bleiben Decabalus' hastig bandagierte Techpriester und der Artifex selbst hinter dir stehen.{/n} "Dankbarkeit: Eure Unterstützung bei der Räumung des Pfades von Fallen war ausgesprochen effizient. Wir bieten Euch daher unsere Hilfe im Kampf mit dem Feind des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} an."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hörst hinter die das Geräusch vieler Schritte. Nachdem sie den jetzt freien Weg passiert haben, bleiben Decabalus' hastig bandagierte Techpriester und der Artifex selbst hinter dir stehen.{/n} "Dankbarkeit: Eure Unterstützung bei der Räumung des Pfades von Fallen war ausgesprochen effizient. Wir bieten Euch daher unsere Hilfe im Kampf mit dem Feind des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} an."

languages.text: {n}Omzunun üzerinden birçok ayak sesi duyuyorsun. Artık temizlenmiş yoldan geçen Decabalus'un alelacele sarılmış Tekno Rahipleri, bizzat Zanaatkâr ile birlikte arkanda duruyor.{/n} "Minnettarlık: Yolu tuzaklardan temizleme konusundaki yardımınız son derece etkiliydi. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} düşmanına karşı savaşta desteğimizi sunacağız."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Omzunun üzerinden birçok ayak sesi duyuyorsun. Artık temizlenmiş yoldan geçen Decabalus'un alelacele sarılmış Tekno Rahipleri, bizzat Zanaatkâr ile birlikte arkanda duruyor.{/n} "Minnettarlık: Yolu tuzaklardan temizleme konusundaki yardımınız son derece etkiliydi. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} düşmanına karşı savaşta desteğimizi sunacağız."

languages.text: {n}Vous entendez des piétinements dans votre dos. Profitant du chemin désormais dégagé, les technoprêtres de Décabalus viennent se placer derrière vous, accompagnés de l'artisan lui-même. Tous ont été bandés à la hâte.{/n} « Gratitude : votre aide pour dégager le chemin a été extrêmement précieuse. Nous vous offrirons notre soutien dans la bataille contre l'ennemi de {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}l'Omnimessie{/g}. »
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. We will offer our support in the battle against the enemy of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
